phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca dos Queijos da Serra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAHNNG-kuh DOOSH KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Queijos da Serra.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Queijos da Serra.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fish Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fish Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Peixaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the mountain cheese counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de queijos da serra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Serra da Estrela cheese counters highlight protected designation of origin products and tasting samples.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Mountain Cheese.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Mountain Cheese.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the mountain cheese counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção dos queijos da serra?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah ah sek-SOWN doosh KAY-joosh dah SEH-hah
phrases.cultural_note: Queijos da Serra are a specialty from the Serra da Estrela region, highly prized in Portuguese gastronomy.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está perto do talho regional.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH PEHR-too DOO TAH-lyoo reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's near the regional butcher shop.

responses.english: Good morning, it's near the regional butcher shop.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH PEHR-too DOO TAH-lyoo reh-zheeoo-NAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, está perto do talho regional.

phrases.text_local: Onde encontro um restaurante autêntico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih ow-TAYNG-tee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte aos feirantes ou ao pessoal do balcão de informações; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH fay-RAHNNG-tihsh OHW OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the market vendors or the information desk staff; they know the local options well.

responses.english: Ask the market vendors or the information desk staff; they know the local options well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH fay-RAHNNG-tihsh OHW OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.french: Pergunte aos feirantes ou ao pessoal do balcão de informações; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de pesagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH peh-ZAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese markets, weighing produce is typically done at a dedicated counter before paying.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca dos Queijos da Serra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAHNNG-kuh DOOSH KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh?

likely_response.local: Procure uma banca com a placa 'Queijos da Serra' ou pergunte a um feirante.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih OO-muh BAHNNG-kuh KOHM AH PLAH-kuh'KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh' OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Look for a stall with the 'Queijos da Serra' sign or ask a market vendor.

responses.english: Look for a stall with the 'Queijos da Serra' sign or ask a market vendor.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih OO-muh BAHNNG-kuh KOHM AH PLAH-kuh'KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh' OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih.
responses.french: Procure uma banca com a placa 'Queijos da Serra' ou pergunte a um feirante.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the regional butcher is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho para o talho regional?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW TAH-lyoo reh-zheeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional butchers emphasize local livestock and traditional cutting techniques.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga até ao fundo do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh uh-TEH OW FOONNG-doo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go straight to the back of the market.

responses.english: Good morning, go straight to the back of the market.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh uh-TEH OW FOONNG-doo DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga até ao fundo do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the dairy counter is
phrases.text_local: Pode dizer onde fica o balcão de laticínios?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH luh-tee-SEE-neeoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Dairy counters typically offer fresh curd, yogurts, and regional milk products under refrigeration.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de laticínios.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH luh-tee-SEE-neeoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the dairy counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the dairy counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH luh-tee-SEE-neeoosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de laticínios.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Balcão de vinhos is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, pode indicar a localização do Balcão de vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO bahl-KOWN DIH VEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Wine counters in municipal markets typically stock regional DOC wines and serve by the glass.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante ou dirija-se ao balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, can you point me to the Wine Counter? Ask a market vendor or go to the information counter.

responses.english: Good morning, can you point me to the Wine Counter? Ask a market vendor or go to the information counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Pergunte a um feirante ou dirija-se ao balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Talho Regional is
phrases.cultural_note: Local markets in Portugal often organize meat counters near the rear for ventilation and hygiene compliance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the artisanal bakery is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Padaria Artesanal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH puh-duh-REEUH uh-ruh-tih-zahn-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Artisanal bakeries in markets often open early to supply fresh bread for morning shoppers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish hall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Peixaria neste mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pay-shuh-REEUH NEHSH-tih meh-ruh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fish halls are usually placed at the back or sides to maintain cold chain and ventilation standards.

likely_response.local: A Peixaria está indicada nas placas do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH pay-shuh-REEUH ehs-TAH een-dee-KAH-duh NUHSH PLAH-kuhsh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: The fish hall is indicated on the market signs.

responses.english: The fish hall is indicated on the market signs.
responses.phonetic: AH pay-shuh-REEUH ehs-TAH een-dee-KAH-duh NUHSH PLAH-kuhsh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: A Peixaria está indicada nas placas do mercado.
